front.title: A huge wooden sphere
front.description: Half-buried and largely overgrown, about 4 feet across and weighing hundreds of pounds. It is strangely well preserved and adorned with intricate pictograms. A handful of other spheres rot nearby.

list.description: The pictograms depict some sort of recipe, which you can learn but you must…
The pictograms depict some sort of recipe, which you can learn but you must…
… first dig up and clean the sphere.
… acquire the bile of a wild boar.
… you risk getting the recipe wrong, and lethally so.

back.title: Ffyrnig Tonic
back.description: When you pickle fresh ffyrnig root in a suspension of boar bile for two full moons, it becomes a skin of ffyrnig tonic (3 uses, magical).

move.name: When you take a draught of ffyrnig tonic
move.description:
Pick 1:

  • Regain HP equal to ½ your max
  • Clear a debility

Also, you have advantage on your next roll to take bold, physical action. But until you take such an action, you have disadvantage on any rolls that require patience, care, or thoughtfulness.

When you drink a second draught of ffyrnig tonic before getting a good night's sleep, it has no effect other than to make you ill (mark a debility).
